title: Is there a way to delete a group through automation after group is empty
excerpt: I have imported new items into the board. Through automation I could move it to the specific group. Now that newly created group on import is empty, I would like to delete the group through automation. Doing it manually …

posts.author: PuneetDuneja (Puneet Duneja)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have imported new items into the board. Through automation I could move it to the specific group. Now that newly created group on import is empty, I would like to delete the group through automation. Doing it manually does not seem optimized approach.

Please help! thank you !

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Its a couple of clicks (so I don’t think they will prioritise this quality of life update), but I think the better option could be to choose a group for your data to go into during the import procedure steps, or create a new one.

Bruce Gosk | bruce@mintconsulting.org

posts.author: TimSburv (Timoti Sburv)
posts.cookedHtml: Currently, monday.com doesn’t offer an automation to delete empty groups, but you can work around this by setting up an automation that triggers when an item count in a group reaches zero, sending an alert or triggering a webhook to handle it externally. Another option is to refine your import process so that new items always land in a predefined group, avoiding the need to delete empty ones afterward.

posts.author: DavidSchenkler (David Schenkler | monday ambassador cohort 7)
posts.cookedHtml: How do you import directly into a specific group?

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Doesn’t look like its been added natively yet. The Data Importer app would be the way to go at the moment if you are open to using apps (starts free).

posts.author: willsamadi (Will Samadi)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you asked me to set this up for you, I would add a separate view, use the group-by feature to group based on a certain status column. Now if you uncheck the “show empty” it will automatically not show empty groups.

This will turn your groups into a status column which is easier to manage and automate.

posts.author: Rach12 (Rachael )
posts.cookedHtml: This is a great idea for deleting items! I also found this for deleting groups, might be the best I’ve found although I have not used it yet: Groups Manager - monday.com Marketplace
